title: Kwano Diski Kings the Kasi Cup champs
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Local favourites Kwano Diski Kings FC were crowned champions of the 2024 Kasi Cup after a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Kwano Free Agents FC in the final, held on last Sunday afternoon, 19 October, at Kwanokuthula Stadium.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Local favourites Kwano Diski Kings FC were crowned champions of the 2024 Kasi Cup after a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Kwano Free Agents FC in the final, held on last Sunday afternoon, 19 October, at Kwanokuthula Stadium."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Awonke Sondaba scored the match-winning goal, sealing the title for Diski Kings in a tense showdown."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The final was fiercely contested, with both teams playing an exciting brand of football. Despite pressure from Free Agents, Diski Kings' solid defence held firm to secure the win.","html":"The final was fiercely contested, with both teams playing an exciting brand of football. Despite pressure from Free Agents, Diski Kings' solid defence held firm to secure the win."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Eight local teams took part in this year's tournament: QBP Kasi Eagles, Kwano Free Agents, NH Stars, Kwano Diski Kings, Kranshoek Royals, 18 Lions, Qolweni United and Lucky Loser FC. In the semi-finals, Diski Kings defeated Qolweni United 4-1, while 18 Lions edged past Free Agents 4-2.","html":"Eight local teams took part in this year's tournament: QBP Kasi Eagles, Kwano Free Agents, NH Stars, Kwano Diski Kings, Kranshoek Royals, 18 Lions, Qolweni United and Lucky Loser FC. In the semi-finals, Diski Kings defeated Qolweni United 4-1, while 18 Lions edged past Free Agents 4-2."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Centre forward Siyabonga Soduma of Diski Kings was named player of the tournament after scoring six goals throughout the competition. Malick \"Muller\" Mpunjo of Muller Jnr Sportswear awarded him with a new pair of soccer boots.","html":"Centre forward Siyabonga Soduma of Diski Kings was named player of the tournament after scoring six goals throughout the competition. Malick \"Muller\" Mpunjo of Muller Jnr Sportswear awarded him with a new pair of soccer boots."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tournament organiser Siyamkele Tsomo praised the tournament's growth, calling for more sponsorship to support community sport and provide local players a platform to develop during the off-season.","html":"Tournament organiser Siyamkele Tsomo praised the tournament's growth, calling for more sponsorship to support community sport and provide local players a platform to develop during the off-season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
